summary: Iteration 3 testing: All 6 requested features verified via Playwright UI tests. All flows working correctly.

test_results.1_video_camera_bug: PASS - In headless environment no camera available. Camera error shown correctly (data-testid='camera-error'): 'No se encontró ninguna cámara. Comprueba que tienes una cámara conectada.' Page does NOT break. Train page renders correctly.
test_results.2_wrong_credentials_error: PASS - data-testid='auth-error' shows 'Email o contraseña incorrectos' inside the modal. Modal remains open. No redirect. api.js interceptor fix working correctly (only redirects on 401 when auth_token present).
test_results.3_successful_login: PASS - test@cibermedida.es / Test2024! logs in and navigates to /dashboard
test_results.4_dashboard_cards_level_xp: PASS - Dashboard shows: level card (data-testid='level-card'), XP bar (data-testid='xp-bar-container', 'xp-progress', 'xp-card'), sessions stat card, recommended exercise card. 'Nivel' and 'XP' text visible.
test_results.5_train_page: PASS - Train page loads (data-testid='train-page'). MP Status shows 'MediaPipe activo' (data-testid='mp-status'). Start button (data-testid='start-btn') present but disabled without camera - expected. MediaPipe successfully loaded from CDN.
test_results.6_logout: PASS - data-testid='logout-btn' found in navbar. Clicking it redirects to '/' (landing page). Auth state cleared.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 tested features passing. api.js 401 interceptor fix confirmed working. Train page handles no-camera gracefully. MediaPipe loads from CDN in Playwright headless. Logout via data-testid='logout-btn' works.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No bugs found in this iteration
